svg.text:
💡 KEY FEATURES OF KANVAS:
• Active-Heartbeat Lifecycling: Active environments ping backend every 60s. Idle environments are automatically terminated to save up to 90% cloud cost. • Pre-warmed Pool: Backend maintains a set of hot running EC2 VMs so new workspaces load instantly in under 5 seconds. • Auto-scaling Integration: Spins up fresh nodes dynamically using the AWS Auto Scaling SDK as pool instances are claimed. • Budget Protection: Limits active workspaces to a maximum of 2 concurrent projects per developer.
On-demand, self-scaling, heartbeat-lifecycled VS Code workspaces
EC2 IDE Instance (Running VS Code Server)
4. Route developer to instant cloud IDE link (DNS/IP)
🔄 Keepalive loop: Active heartbeat checks every 60s
